hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git (commit|push)\b'; then flag=$(cat ~/.claude/kairo-git-flag 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); if [ "$flag" != "1" ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"\ud83d\udeab Blocked: the last user message did not contain an explicit commit or push instruction."}'; fi; fi
